scripts.clean:reports: rimraf reports && mkdir -p reports/json reports/html-report reports/screenshots reports/videos
scripts.test: npm run clean:reports && cucumber-js --format progress --format json:reports/json/cucumber-report.json && npm run report
scripts.test:dev: npm run clean:reports && cross-env ENV=dev cucumber-js --format progress --format json:reports/json/dev-report.json && npm run report
scripts.test:smoke: npm run clean:reports && cucumber-js --tags @smoke --format progress --format json:reports/json/smoke-report.json && npm run report
scripts.test:formulario: npm run clean:reports && cucumber-js --tags @formulario --format progress --format json:reports/json/formulario-report.json && npm run report
scripts.test:elephant: npm run clean:reports && cucumber-js --tags @elephant --format progress --format json:reports/json/elephant-report.json && npm run report
scripts.test:chromium: npm run clean:reports && cross-env BROWSER=chromium cucumber-js --format progress --format json:reports/json/chromium-report.json && npm run report
scripts.test:firefox: npm run clean:reports && cross-env BROWSER=firefox cucumber-js --format progress --format json:reports/json/firefox-report.json && npm run report
scripts.test:webkit: npm run clean:reports && cross-env BROWSER=webkit cucumber-js --format progress --format json:reports/json/webkit-report.json && npm run report
scripts.test:browsers: npm run clean:reports && npm-run-all --continue-on-error --parallel test:chromium:run test:firefox:run test:webkit:run && npm run report
